expectations.text: Uses ai.chats.create(...) + chat.sendMessage(...) to keep image context across turns
expectations.evidence: ai.chats.create(...) + chat.sendMessage(...); session retains image context

expectations.text: Passes the uploaded image as an inlineData part (base64 mimeType+data) or Files API
expectations.evidence: inlineImage() base64 parts; Files API noted

expectations.text: States reference-image limit: up to 14 total (Flash up to 10 objects + 4 characters)
Uses a correct GA model id (gemini-3.1-flash-image or gemini-3-pro-image), no -preview suffix
